usage_message:
рЯ§Ц **Agent is ready!** Available commands:

```
!status   вАФ Check agent status
!cancel   вАФ Cancel current task
!cwd          вАФ Show working directory
!cwd <dir>    вАФ Set working directory (takes effect on !reset)
!reset    вАФ Restart agent session
!start <dir>  вАФ Bind a project directory
!pause    вАФ Switch to @mention mode
!back     вАФ Resume full-listen mode
!resume   вАФ Re-display last truncated response
!model          вАФ Show current model
!model <model>  вАФ Switch model (auto-restarts agent)
!models         вАФ List available models
```
Send any message to chat with the agent.
error.parse_schedule:
вЭМ Invalid cron expression: %s
Format: `min hour day month weekday`
Examples: `*/30 * * * *` (every 30 min), `0 9 * * 1-5` (weekdays 9am)
error.not_cron_format:
Not a valid cron expression. Use 5 fields: min hour day month weekday
Examples: `*/30 * * * *`, `0 9 * * *`, `0 9,18 * * 1-5`
error.parse_time_or_empty:
вЭМ Cannot parse time or content is empty
Usage: `!remind <time> <content>`
Formats: `+30m`, `+2h`, `17:00`, `tomorrow 09:00`
error.parse_time_help: Cannot parse time. Supported: +30m, +2h, 17:00, tomorrow 09:00, жШОе§© 09:00, 30еИЖйРШеЊМ
reset.success: вЬЕ Session reset. Next message starts a new agent.
cwd.set: вЬЕ CWD set to `%s`, takes effect on next reset.
model.switching: вП≥ Switching to model `%s`, restarting agent...
status.format: Agent: `%s` | State: `%s` | Queue: %d | Session: `%s` | Model: `%s` | kiro: `%s` | bot: `%s` | Context: `%.1f%%`
cmd.start.desc: Bind project directory and start agent
cmd.cwd.opt.path: New working directory (leave empty to show current)
cmd.model.opt.model: Model ID (leave empty to show current)
cmd.cron_run.opt.name: Task name
cron.modal.title: Add Scheduled Task
cron.modal.name: Task Name
cron.modal.prompt_ph: e.g. Check server CPU, memory, disk usage and compare with last run
cron.created:
вЬЕ Scheduled task created
Name: **%s**
Cron: `%s` вЖТ %s
Prompt: %s
cron.list.empty: рЯУЛ No scheduled tasks in this channel. Use `/cron` to add one.
remind.usage:
Usage: `!remind <time> <content>`
e.g. `!remind 5pm remind me about the meeting`
cmd.remind.opt.agent: Let agent execute the task (default: just notify)
cron.updated:
вЬЕ Task updated
Name: **%s**
Cron: `%s` вЖТ %s
Prompt: %s
cmd.compact.desc: Compress conversation history to free context
thread_agent.idle_closed: рЯТ§ Thread agent closed due to inactivity. Send a message to restart.
thread_agent.limit_reached: вЪ†пЄП Thread agent limit reached, closed the least recently used agent.
warn.attachments_large: вЪ†пЄП Total attachment size ~%d MB may exceed processing limit (%d MB). Consider sending files in batches or adjusting MAX_SCANNER_BUFFER_MB.

вЪ†пЄП Agent communication lost: %v
Use /reset to restart.
